--[[ v1.0.0 https://wearedevs.net/obfuscator ]] return(function(...)local h={"\111\053\118\103\099\079\049\089\119\104\065\066\118\116\083\086\090\083\089\061","\065\103\117\075\051\051\084\079\067\067\067\070\121\107\069\101\113\069\052\117";"\074\117\083\051\074\087\061\061","\111\043\103\067\065\121\055\072\052\110\109\075\074\101\043\104\054\043\102\077\112\048\048\103";"\070\052\085\088\112\104\090\083\068\121\054\047";"\103\080\069\073\111\100\114\050\104\047\078\109\119\048\089\117\103\057\106\100\080\085\078\043\098\072\078\075\119\079\099\061","\074\103\069\101\052\056\119\106","\052\068\088\083\052\048\084\119\066\098\113\065\100\056\071\109\081\108\098\086\047\121\055\061";"\051\049\067\072\105\120\111\114\082\070\055\086\082\087\075\071\097\090\101\057","\049\054\086\075\067\090\088\061","\050\103\110\109\050\115\111\071\084\056\089\061";"\069\103\083\051\089\103\069\072\102\054\086\105\050\103\069\113\050\103\069\090\102\087\061\061","\070\117\119\066\086\109\074\071\086\049\069\057\055\056\111\073\069\090\102\061","\052\117\110\097\052\117\083\048";"\069\083\050\117\084\080\074\071\104\069\111\100\074\115\105\071","\049\048\071\114\055\069\083\075\074\105\111\098\070\109\050\105","\074\117\069\048\074\117\069\097\050\122\061\061","\076\090\102\088\089\115\050\073\089\117\077\051\074\080\079\069\049\116\061\061";"\074\056\077\047\084\098\102\061","\104\117\106\114\074\109\077\052\120\116\115\066\097\073\051\113\111\051\103\098\056\099\116\061","\099\099\122\121\085\117\086\055\099\089\109\070\082\071\107\111\108\055\108\104\107\113\084\111\081\087\089\061";"\079\107\097\086\051\076\076\065\103\086\077\085\069\067\070\075\111\098\099\087\089\088\061\061","\069\070\081\084\121\043\069\088\103\076\043\102\065\122\061\061","\055\103\069\054\119\104\099\048\076\055\051\100\076\080\122\072\087\056\055\061";"\089\117\069\048\084\104\069\048\052\114\086\079\052\056\077\105";"\084\055\082\109\076\117\086\115\073\115\083\113\074\115\079\052\119\105\055\061","\073\115\086\048\089\054\050\105\050\116\061\061";"\078\122\061\061","\121\050 end local function z(z)return h[z+(24424-(-33897))]end do local z=math.floor local E=type local R=string.char local V=table.insert local j=table.concat local J=string.sub local O=string.len local return(function(h,R,V,j,J,O,T,E,N,c,A,a,t,y,Q,k,s,u,B,r,S,K)E,k,N,S,u,c,B,a,K,y,s,Q,r,t,A=function(E,V,j,J)local kG={}local ho,qo,Ko,o,Yo,M,zo,U,go,Lo,D,zG,yo,TG,vo,co,Co,n,Ao,b,Ro,Wo,bo,p,c,xo,jo,Z,OG,ro,cG,X,Mo,g,f,lo,Q,so,eo,ko,Vo,q,hG,C,Ho,L,QG,i,Uo,Eo,To,W,RG,v,to,w,no,e,wo,Po,B,NG,io,Do,po,mo,Oo,d,P,VG,Xo,EG,Zo,JG,x,uo,jG,m,I,fo,Io,No,BG,So,l,ao,KG,k,Qo,Jo,oo,H,T,Bo,Y,G,S,F,Fo,Go end,{},function(h,z)local R=Q(z)local V=function(...)return E(h,{...},z,R)end return V end,function(h,z)local R=Q(z)local V=function()return E(h,{},z,R)end return V end,-573391-(-573391),{},function(h,z)local R=Q(z)local V=function(V,j,J)return E(h,{V;j;J},z,R)end return V end,function()c=(-467934+467935)+c B[c]=-394373+394374 return c end,function(h)B[h]=B[h]-(-108573+108574)if B[h]==-55224-(-55224)then B[h],N[h]=nil,nil end end,function(h,z)local R=Q(z)local V=function(V)return E(h,{V},z,R)end return V end,function(h)for z=408779+-408778,#h,612364-612363 do B[h[z]]=B[h[z]]+(427120+-427119)end if V then local E=V(true)local j({},{[z(368360+-426667)]=k;[z(43493-101798)]=h;[z(763035-821259)]=function()return-1601895-(-888098)end})end end,function(h,z)local R=Q(z)local V=function(V,j,J,O,T,N,B)return
